STORY.TITLE: Our Story
STORY.SUBTITLE: Rooted in Calabria
STORY.TEXT1: There's a moment on the Ionian coast of Calabria when the smoke from the grill meets the sea air. When lunch becomes aperitivo, and aperitivo becomes evening.
STORY.TEXT2: Focu Meu was born here. In Sant'Andrea Apostolo dello Ionio, in the heart of Calabria.
STORY.TEXT3: A contemporary restaurant and lido telling the story of Calabria through fire, food and the rhythm of the coast. The kitchen is rooted in Calabrian tradition - woodfire grilling, seasonal ingredients, intense flavours of the territory - reinterpreted with a modern sensibility, without losing its soul.
STORY.TEXT4: Guests come for the food. They stay for everything else.
STORY.TEXT5: The fire is lit. A place you come back to, on the Ionian coast, Calabria.

EXPERIENCE.TITLE: Experience
EXPERIENCE.TEXT1: Cocktails, Calabrian wines and artisan aperitivi. Made for slow afternoons and sunsets on the Ionian Sea.
EXPERIENCE.TEXT2: Contemporary Calabrian cuisine: woodfire grilling, seasonal ingredients and produce from Southern Italy. Tradition, reinterpreted.
EXPERIENCE.TEXT3: Music, fire and coastal hospitality. A shared experience on the Ionian coast of Calabria.

MOMENTS.TITLE: Moments
MOMENTS.ALLERGENS-TEXT: For information on allergens and food intolerances, we kindly ask guests to speak with a member of our team before ordering, in accordance with EU Regulation No. 1169/2011.

FAQ.TITLE: FAQ
FAQ.ANSWER1: Focu Meu is located in Sant'Andrea Apostolo dello Ionio Marina, on the Ionian coast of Calabria, a few minutes from Soverato, in the province of Catanzaro, Southern Italy.
FAQ.QUESTION2: What kind of food does Focu Meu serve?
FAQ.ANSWER2: Contemporary Calabrian cuisine: woodfire grilling, fresh fish from the Ionian coast, seasonal ingredients and produce sourced from the territory of Southern Italy.
FAQ.ANSWER3: During the summer season, booking is recommended — especially for sunset aperitivo, dinner and weekends on the Calabrian coast.
FAQ.QUESTION4: Does Focu Meu serve cocktails and aperitivo?
FAQ.ANSWER4: Yes. Artisan cocktails, Calabrian wines, spritzes and aperitivo are available throughout the day and evening, with views over the Ionian Sea.
FAQ.QUESTION5: Can I organise a private event at Focu Meu?
FAQ.ANSWER5: Yes. Focu Meu hosts private events, group dinners and celebrations during the summer season. Get in touch for availability and details.
FAQ.QUESTION6: Is Focu Meu close to Soverato?
FAQ.ANSWER6: Yes. Focu Meu is just a few minutes from Soverato, along the Ionian coast of Calabria, Southern Italy.
FAQ.ANSWER7: Yes. Focu Meu offers brunch on the water during the summer season, on the Ionian coast of Calabria. Booking is recommended.

CONTACTS.TITLE: Find Us
CONTACTS.SUBTITLE: From brunch on the water and long lunches, to sunset aperitivo and summer dinners on the Ionian coast of Calabria.
CONTACTS.TEXT1: Focu Meu brings together contemporary Calabrian cuisine, cocktails, Calabrian wines and the energy of the Ionian coast - a space made for slow afternoons and long evenings on the Ionian Sea.
CONTACTS.ADDRESS: Via Raffaele Lombardi, 20 Sant'Andrea Apostolo dello Ionio 88060, CZ

FOOTER.TEXT: Book your table and experience summer on the Ionian coast of Calabria.

SEO.TITLE: Focu Meu – Restaurant & Bar
SEO.DESCRIPTION: Calabrian cuisine, grilled specialties, and aperitifs by the Ionian Sea in Sant'Andrea Apostolo. Just a few minutes from Soverato. Open from dawn until late at night.
SEO.KEYWORDS: restaurant Sant'Andrea Apostolo dello Ionio, Calabrian cuisine, Ionian coast restaurant, Calabria sunset aperitif, Focu Meu, near Soverato, grilled fish, grilled meat
SEO.OG_TITLE: Focu Meu – From Dawn to Dusk on the Ionian Coast
SEO.OG_DESCRIPTION: Calabrian cuisine, cocktails, and grilled specialties by the Ionian Sea. In Sant'Andrea Apostolo dello Ionio, just minutes from Soverato.
